top_signals.title: Europe unveils tech sovereignty package amid growing concerns over reliance on U.S. tech: 'We want to be sure nobody has a kill switch'
top_signals.summary: The proposals include new acts to bolster advanced chip manufacturing and homegrown cloud computing.

top_signals.title: Kirkland & Ellis partners with Palantir for AI-driven private equity work
top_signals.summary: The world’s largest law firm by revenue, Kirkland & Ellis, has agreed to partner with tech giant Palantir to create an AI tool to use in advising private equity firms. The US-based firm, which has a large City office, said the multi-year partnership will deploy technology to share the expertise of its leading partners with [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bunq: Revolut rival eyeing up UK banking licence bid
top_signals.summary: Europe’s second largest digital bank is gearing up for a bid for a UK banking licence, City AM can reveal, as the firm puts its hat in the ring in the fight to claw market share from fintech leader Revolut.  Bunq – which reached 20 million users in just a decade – is understood to [...]
